name: gestdist-pro
description: Sistema de Gestión de Distribución - GestDist Pro

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.dev: concurrently "cd backend && npm run dev" "cd frontend && npm run dev" --names "BACKEND,FRONTEND" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta"
scripts.build: cd frontend && rm -rf node_modules && npm install && npm run build
scripts.start: concurrently "cd backend && npm start" "cd frontend && npm run preview" --names "BACKEND,FRONTEND" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta"
